f.f86: [{id:'1',text:[{id:'t1',topicFocus:'',role:'loc',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:'f'},transcription:'銀同',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'gîn/gûn tâng',cantonese:'ngan2/ngan4 tung4',pinyin:'yín tóng'},translation},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'date',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:''},transcription:'民國八九年春',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'Bîn-kok Pat káu liân tshun',cantonese:'man4 gwok3 baat3 gau2 nin4 ceon1',pinyin:'mín guó bā jiǔ nián chūn'},translation},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'',role:'person',properties:{dateMeaning:'',calendar:'',decade:'',era:'',writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:''},transcription:'顯(考/妣)黃(公本來/媽張粉)佳城',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'hián khó pí hông kong pún-lâi mah tiong hún kha Siânn',cantonese:'hin2 haau2 bei2 wong4 gung1 bun2 lai4:loi4:loi6 maa1:maa2:maa5 zoeng1:zoeng3 fan2 gaai1 seng4:sing4',pinyin:'xiǎn kǎo bǐ huáng gōng běn lái mā zhāng fěn jiā chéng'},translation}]}]

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 baat3 gau2 nin4 ceon1
mín guó bā jiǔ nián chūn

text.transcription: 顯(考/妣)黃(公本來/媽張粉)佳城

transliterations.transliteration: hián khó pí hông kong pún-lâi mah tiong hún kha Siânn
hin2 haau2 bei2 wong4 gung1 bun2 lai4/loi4/loi6 maa1/maa2/maa5 zoeng1/zoeng3 fan2 gaai1 seng4/sing4
xiǎn kǎo bǐ huáng gōng běn lái mā zhāng fěn jiā chéng

normalization.div: 顯(考/妣)黃(公本來/媽張粉)佳城

transliterations.transliteration: 乙 mauh Liân Muî Gua̍t siu
jyut3/jyut6 maau5 nin4 mui4 jyut6 sau1
yǐ mǎo nián méi yuè xiū
Tēnn hú Ngôo Thài 孺 jîn/bí îng
zeng6/zing6 fu2 ng4 taai3 jyu4/jyu6 jan4 jing4
zhèng fǔ wú tài rú rén yíng

trans.div: Tomb of Wu Tairu of Zheng Mansion

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 bing2 jan4 gwai3 jyut6

trans.div: Bingyin Guiyue of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: Kòo Káng Kok huâi tsi kha îng
gu3 gong1 gwok3 waai4 zi1 gaai1 jing4
gù jiāng guó huái zhī jiā yíng

trans.div: The best tombs of Jiang, Guo and Huai

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 seot1 ng5 joeng4 jyut6
mín guó xū wǔ yáng yuè
hô mah gua̍t Iú hông sī 坆
ho4/ho6 maa1/maa2/maa5 jyut6 jau5/jau6 wong4 si6/zi1 fan4
hé mā yuè yǒu huáng shì méi
man4 gwok3 sei3/si3 sap6 nin4 sau1

trans.div: Revised in the 40th year of the Republic of China

text.transcription: 鄭媽(陳氏金市/姑母鄭氏?)茔

f.f86: [{id:'1',art:['epigraphy'],text:[{id:'t1',topicFocus:'topic',role:'loc',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:'f'},transcription:'平和',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'pîng-hô',cantonese:'peng4/ping4 wo4/wo6',pinyin:'píng hé'},translation},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'date',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:''},transcription:'民國庚午年修',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'Bîn-kok king ngóo Liân siu',cantonese:'man4 gwok3 gang1 ng5 nin4 sau1',pinyin:'mín guó gēng wǔ nián xiū'},translation},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'person',properties:{dateMeaning:'',calendar:'chineseLunar',decade:'',era:'',writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:''},transcription:'何媽罔却鄭氏坟',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'hô mah bóng 却 tīng sī 坟',cantonese:'ho4:ho6 maa1:maa2:maa5 mong5 koek3 zeng6:zing6 si6:zi1 fan4',pinyin:'hé mā wǎng què zhèng shì fén'},translation}]}]

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 gang1 ng5 nin4 sau1
mín guó gēng wǔ nián xiū

trans.div: Revised in the Gengwu Year of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: hô mah bóng 却 tīng sī 坟
ho4/ho6 maa1/maa2/maa5 mong5 koek3 zeng6/zing6 si6/zi1 fan4
hé mā wǎng què zhèng shì fén

text.transcription: 民(前十/國五十)年(四/十)月(十/五)日

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn Tsîng tsa̍p kok Ngóo tsa̍p liân sì tsa̍p Gue̍h tsa̍p Ngóo Ji̍t
man4 cin4 sap6 gwok3 ng5 sap6 nin4 sei3/si3 sap6 jyut6 sap6 ng5 jat6
mín qián shí guó wǔ shí nián sì shí yuè shí wǔ rì
Kòo iông 俊 tsâi tsi bōng
gu3 joeng4 zeon3 coi4 zi1 mou6
gù yáng jùn cái zhī mù

text.transcription: 一九八二年壬戌花月吉旦

transliterations.transliteration: tsi̍t kiú pat jī liân 壬 戌 Hue Gue̍h Kiat tuànn
jat1 gau2 baat3 ji6 nin4 jam4 seot1 faa1 jyut6 gat1 daan3
yī jiǔ bā èr nián rén xū huā yuè jí dàn

trans.div: The auspicious day of the Renxu Flower Moon in 1982

transliterations.transliteration: Kòo Tân Hú píng hông kha îng
gu3 can4/zan6 fu2 bing2 wong4 gaai1 jing4
gù chén fǔ bǐng huáng jiā yíng

trans.div: Therefore, the Binghuang Tomb of the Chen Mansion

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok bōo sin liân 荔 Gua̍t
man4 gwok3 mou6 san1 nin4 lai6 jyut6
mínguó wù shēn nián lì yuè

trans.div: The Li month of the Wushen year of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: Ngôo mn̂g 沈 sī tsìn kha îng
ng4 mun4 cam4/sam2 si6/zi1 zeon3 gaai1 jing4
wú mén chén shì jìn jiā yíng

text.transcription: 男 旺根 木生 家成 家興 孫 其新 秋明 秋福 忠福 忠義 忠信 忠正 曾孫 宗勳 仝立石

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 gei2 cau2 cat1 jyut6

trans.div: July of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok 乙 巳 葭 gue̍h
man4 gwok3 jyut3/jyut6 zi6 gaa1 jyut6
ngôo mn̂g siā sī suî kha bōng
ng4 mun4 ze6 si6/zi1 ceoi4 gaai1 mou6
wú mén xiè shì suí jiā mù

trans.div: Tomb of Suijia of Xie family in Wumen

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 sei3/si3 baat3 joeng4 jyut6
Kòo liân Hú iûnn tsi̍t tsi îng
gu3 lin4 fu2 joeng4 jat1 zi1 jing4
gù lián fǔ yáng yī zhī yíng

trans.div: Therefore, the tomb of Lian Fu Yang 1

text.transcription: 胞弟 洋三 洋二 洋四 仝立石
民國(廿?/五九)年(?/元)月(廿/廿五)日(生/殁)

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok jia̍p/lia̍p ngóo Kiú Liân Guân gue̍h jia̍p/lia̍p jia̍p/lia̍p ngóo Ji̍t tshenn 殁
man4 gwok3 jaa6/je6/nim6 ng5 gau2 nin4 jyun4 jyut6 jaa6/je6/nim6 jaa6/je6/nim6 ng5 jat6 saang1/sang1 mut6
mínguó niàn wǔ jiǔ nián yuán yuè niàn niàn wǔ rì shēng mò

trans.div: Died on January 25, 59th year of the Republic of China
Born on the 20th of the 20th year of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: kòo Tân Kong 楣 tsi bōng
gu3 can4/zan6 gwong1 mei4 zi1 mou6
gù chén guāng méi zhī mù
Bîn-kok sin 亥 葭 gua̍t
man4 gwok3 san1 hoi6 gaa1 jyut6
hián pí 趙 Tân ba̍k 莉 îng
hin2 bei2 ziu6 can4/zan6 muk6 lei6 jing4
xiǎn bǐ zhào chén mù lì yíng

trans.div: Tomb of Zhao Chen Muli, the concubine

transliterations.transliteration: tiong mn̂g 鄴 sī kàu liông îng
zoeng1/zoeng3 mun4 jip6 si6/zi1 gaau1/gaau3 noeng4 jing4
zhāng mén yè shì jiào niáng yíng
Tāi tsiànn king sin Liân tuànn
daai6 zeng3/zing1/zing3 gang1 san1 nin4 daan3
dà zhèng gēng shēn nián dàn
𩔰 khó 邱 hui liông tsi 茔
𩔰haau2 jau1 fai1 loeng4 zi1 jing4
𩔰kǎo qiū huī liáng zhī yíng

trans.div: 𩔰Testing the tomb of Qiu Huiliang

transliterations.transliteration: 癸 酉 liân 菊 Gua̍t tuànn
gwai3 jau5 nin4 guk1 jyut6 daan3
guǐ yǒu nián jú yuè dàn

trans.div: The first day of the chrysanthemum month in the Guiyou year

transliterations.transliteration: sòng mn̂g Tân sī síng liông îng
sung3 mun4 can4/zan6 si6/zi1 saang2/sing2 noeng4 jing4
sòng mén chén shì shěng niáng yíng

trans.div: The tomb of the Chen family of the Song Dynasty

text.transcription: 民国(六年十二月十三日/五十一年三月九日)

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn 国 lio̍k liân tsa̍p Jī Gua̍t tsa̍p sann Ji̍t Ngóo tsa̍p tsi̍t liân sann Gua̍t Kiú Ji̍t
man4 gwok3 luk6 nin4 sap6 ji6 jyut6 sap6 saam1/saam3 jat6 ng5 sap6 jat1 nin4 saam1/saam3 jyut6 gau2 jat6
mínguó liù nián shí èr yuè shí sān rì wǔ shí yī nián sān yuè jiǔ rì

trans.div: December 13, 6th year of the Republic of China
March 9, 501 Years of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: kòo tshuà 煥 hui tsi bōng
gu3 coi3 wun6 fai1 zi1 mou6
gù cài huàn huī zhī mù
man4 gwok3 ng5 sap6 nin4 sau1
Kòo khó Soo uî tsi bōng
gu3 haau2 sou1 wai4/wai6 zi1 mou6
gù kǎo sū wèi zhī mù

text.transcription: 主後一九六六年七月十日

transliterations.transliteration: tsú hiō tsi̍t Káu lio̍k lio̍k liân tshit gue̍h tsa̍p li̍t
zyu2 hau6 jat1 gau2 luk6 luk6 nin4 cat1 jyut6 sap6 jat6
zhǔ hòu yī jiǔ liù liù nián qī yuè shí rì
man4 gwok3 gwai3 maau5 cat1 jyut6

trans.div: July of Guimao in the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: Kòo tsing Kang Tong tsi kha 茔
gu3 zung1 gong1 dung1 zi1 gaai1 jing4
gù zhōng jiāng dōng zhī jiā yíng

trans.div: Therefore, the best tomb of Zhong Jiangdong

text.transcription: 民國(一年九月十五日/六十一年九月十四日)(生/死)

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok tsi̍t Liân kiú Gue̍h Tsa̍p Ngóo li̍t lio̍k Tsa̍p tsi̍t Liân kiú Gue̍h Tsa̍p sù li̍t tshenn sí
man4 gwok3 jat1 nin4 gau2 jyut6 sap6 ng5 jat6 luk6 sap6 jat1 nin4 gau2 jyut6 sap6 sei3/si3 jat6 saang1/sang1 sei2/si2
mínguó yī nián jiǔ yuè shí wǔ rì liù shí yī nián jiǔ yuè shí sì rì shēng sǐ
man4 gwok3 sei3/si3 sap6 luk6 nin4

trans.div: 46 years of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: tiunn mn̂g Ông sī 掽 kha 茔
zoeng1/zoeng3 mun4 wong4/wong6 si6/zi1 pung3 gaai1 jing4
zhāng mén wáng shì pèng jiā yíng

mín guó bǐng chén guā yuè

trans.div: Bingchen Guayue of the Republic of China

mín guó xīn sì zhòng chūn

trans.div: February of the Republic of China

zou2 haau2 kim4 gun1 ze6 gung1 mou6
zǔ kǎo qián guān xiè gōng mù

text.transcription: 民國七一年七月廿二日旦

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok Tshit tsi̍t liân Tshit Gue̍h jia̍p/lia̍p jī Ji̍t tuànn
man4 gwok3 cat1 jat1 nin4 cat1 jyut6 jaa6/je6/nim6 ji6 jat6 daan3
mínguó qī yī nián qī yuè niàn èr rì dàn
lí/lâm ing tîn huī lîng tsi îng
jyu5/neoi5/neoi6 jing1 can4/zan6 wai3/wai6 ling4 zi1 jing4
nǚ yīng chén huì líng zhī yíng

trans.div: Tomb of baby girl Chen Huiling

text.transcription: 民國七一年七月廿二日旦
民國(七/六七)年(十一/十二)月(五/三)日(生/歿)

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok tshit lio̍k tshit Liân Tsa̍p tsi̍t Tsa̍p jī Gue̍h Ngóo Sann ji̍t tshenn 歿
man4 gwok3 cat1 luk6 cat1 nin4 sap6 jat1 sap6 ji6 jyut6 ng5 saam1/saam3 jat6 saang1/sang1 mut6
mínguó qī liù qī nián shí yī shí èr yuè wǔ sān rì shēng mò

trans.div: Died on December 3, 67th year of the Republic of China
Born on November 5, 7th year of the Republic of China

text.transcription: 顯考商公>諱廣堯官一位佳城

transliterations.transliteration: hián khó siong kang 諱 kóng giâu kuann tsi̍t uī kha siânn
hin2 haau2 soeng1 gung1 wai5 gwong2 jiu4 gun1 jat1 wai2/wai6 gaai1 seng4/sing4
xiǎn kǎo shāng gōng huì guǎng yáo guān yī wèi jiā chéng

normalization.div: 顯考商公>諱廣堯官一位佳城

trans.div: Xian Kao Shang Gong>Taboo Guang Yao Guan Jiacheng

persons.person: 顯考商公>諱廣堯官一位佳城

text.transcription: 民國(七/六七)年(十一/十二)月(五/三)日(生/歿)
孝男 景全 景元 景祥 景清 景龍 孝女 翠屏 孝媳 廣秀 淑華 素花 雪峰 淑惠 孝孫 登鈞 登凱 登皓 登曜 登壹 孝孫女 雅君 雅薇 媄鈞 琬婷

transliterations.transliteration: kī 丑 liân kuì Gua̍t tì
gei2 cau2 nin4 gwai3 jyut6 zi3
jǐ chǒu nián guì yuè zhì

trans.div: The laurel moon set in the year of Ji Chou
